title: stelis hutchisonii
intro: Stelis hutchisonii, also known as the Ant Orchid, is a type of flowering plant in the orchid family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues and infections, due to its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Stelis hutchisonii include reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and relieving respiratory symptoms such as coughs and congestion. The plant can be prepared as a tea or infusion for medicinal use, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and potential side effects.
